fields.name: boardPointIataCode
fields.description: 3-letter IATA code of the departure airport. e.g. CDG

fields.name: offPointIataCode
fields.description: 3-letter IATA code of the arrival airport. e.g. AMS

fields.name: scheduledSegmentDuration
fields.description: duration of the segment following standard [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Durations)
